title: DAP MC
description: The Official Modpack for The Dead Avatar Project. Built in cooperation with 'The Wizard's Tower'
body:
DAP MC is designed to augment the excellence of Vanilla Minecraft with stable, thoughtful, and fun mods that bring their own unique twist to the table, without leading to an experience that feels like you end up in god-mode.

Carefully selecting Full-Featured & Quality-of-Life mods that broaden the scope of the game, we hope to achieve a balance that can bring the Vanilla and Modded community together to play on the same server, and have something exciting to offer the newest of players, and the veterans.
